      <title>Anthony Edwards Upgraded To Questionable For Game 1 Versus Spurs</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285436/Anthony-Edwards-Upgraded-To-Questionable-For-Game-1-Versus-Spurs</link>
      <description><p>Minnesota Timberwolves guard Anthony Edwards has been upgraded to questionable for Game 1 against the San Antonio Spurs with a bone bruise in his left knee.</p>
<p>It was reported earlier on Sunday that the Wolves have "growing optimism" that Edwards could return to the lineup by Game 3 or 4 against the Spurs, sources told Shams Charania of ESPN.</p>
<p>Edwards, who suffered a bone bruise in his left knee during Game 4 of the first round, will miss the first couple games of the series. </p>
<p>Edwards suffered the injury on April 25. With a 1-2 week recovery timeline, Game 3 of the series will take place Friday. Game 4 is scheduled for Sunday. </p>
<p>Edwards worked out both Saturday and Sunday before traveling with the team to San Antonio.</p>
<p>The Wolves prefer to remain cautious with Edwards, who has been struggling with inflammation in his right knee over the past month. </p></description>
      <pubDate>Sun, 03 May 2026 15:49:17 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285436/Anthony-Edwards-Upgraded-To-Questionable-For-Game-1-Versus-Spurs</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Edwards_Anthony_min_260420.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Blazers To Be 'Prime Trade Suitor' For Giannis Antetokounmpo, May Pursue Anthony Davis As Alternative</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285425/Blazers-To-Be-Prime-Trade-Suitor-For-Giannis-Antetokounmpo-May-Pursue-Anthony-Davis-As-Alternative</link>
      <description><p>The Portland Trail Blazers are set to emerge as a "prime trade suitor" for Giannis Antetokounmpo this offseason, according to Jake Fischer of The People's Insider.</p>
<p>The Blazers discussed deals for Antetokounmpo with the Bucks before the trade deadline.</p>
<p>The team is looking to build a trade package revolving around Jerami Grant's expiring contract. </p>
<p>The Blazers also own the Bucks' first-round picks in 2028, 2029, and 2030.</p>
<p>The Blazers also reportedly contacted the Mavs before the trade deadline over a possible deal for Anthony Davis. </p>
<p>They could still pursue Davis should they fall short on an Antetokounmpo deal. </p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 02 May 2026 22:52:12 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285425/Blazers-To-Be-Prime-Trade-Suitor-For-Giannis-Antetokounmpo-May-Pursue-Anthony-Davis-As-Alternative</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Antetokounmpo_Giannis_mil_251210.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Nuggets To Retain David Adelman As Head Coach, Looking To Sign Nikola Jokic To Long-Term Extension</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285441/Nuggets-To-Retain-David-Adelman-As-Head-Coach-Looking-To-Sign-Nikola-Jokic-To-Long-Term-Extension</link>
      <description><p>David Adelman will return as the head coach of the Denver Nuggets, according to Shams Charania of ESPN.</p>
<p>"He will be back. His job is safe," said Charania.</p>
<p>The Nuggets finished with a 54-28 record this season. They were the third seed in the Western Conference before losing to the Timberwolves in the first round.</p>
<p>Charania adds the the Nuggets are also planning to sign Nikola Jokic to a long-term contract extension.</p>
<p>Jokic will be eligible for a four-year, $290 million deal. </p>
<p>"The expectation on both sides is that Jokic will be signing that when he's eligible in July," said Charania. </p>
<p>There will also be roster changes in Denver, according to Charania.</p>
<p>"There's going to be real roster changes coming to Denver to identify how they can surround Nikola Jokic with the right pieces to get this team over the top," said Charania. </p></description>
      <pubDate>Sun, 03 May 2026 21:29:31 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285441/Nuggets-To-Retain-David-Adelman-As-Head-Coach-Looking-To-Sign-Nikola-Jokic-To-Long-Term-Extension</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Adelman_David_den_250410.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Matt Lloyd Takes Lead To Be New Bulls' Head Of Basketball Operations; Would Hire Micah Nori As Coach</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285434/Matt-Lloyd-Takes-Lead-To-Be-New-Bulls-Head-Of-Basketball-Operations;-Would-Hire-Micah-Nori-As-Coach</link>
      <description><p>Minnesota Timberwolves general manager Matt Lloyd has reportedly taken the lead to become the new head of basketball operations for the Chicago Bulls, sources told Joe Cowley of the Chicago Sun-Times.</p>
<p>Lloyd could be hired for the job over the next few days. </p>
<p>Lloyd previously worked for the Bulls, with current Bulls' advisor John Paxson remaining a strong supporter.</p>
<p>Cowley adds that should Lloyd get the Bulls' top job, he would hire Micah Nori as the next head coach. </p>
<p>The Hawks' Bryson Graham, Pistons' Dennis Lindsey, and Celtics assistant GM Dave Lewin also remain in the running.</p>
<p> </p></description>
      <pubDate>Sun, 03 May 2026 13:19:56 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285434/Matt-Lloyd-Takes-Lead-To-Be-New-Bulls-Head-Of-Basketball-Operations;-Would-Hire-Micah-Nori-As-Coach</guid>

   <item>
      <title>Joel Embiid, Tyrese Maxey Lead 76ers Past Celtics In Game 7 To Complete Historic 3-1 Comeback</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285426/Joel-Embiid-Tyrese-Maxey-Lead-76ers-Past-Celtics-In-Game-7-To-Complete-Historic-3-1-Comeback</link>
      <description><p>Joel Embiid scored 34 points with 12 rebounds and six assists Saturday as the Philadelphia 76ers defeated the Boston Celtics 109-100 in Game 7, completing the first comeback from a 3-1 series deficit in franchise history. The Sixers advance to face the New York Knicks in the Eastern Conference semifinals.</p>
<p>Tyrese Maxey added 30 points, 11 rebounds and seven assists. Philadelphia held Boston to 40% shooting while the Celtics, playing without injured Jayson Tatum, made just two of their first 12 three-point attempts and never led after the second quarter.</p>
<p>"For him to do that for us and his team, man," Maxey said of Embiid. "Like, all we can do is appreciate him. He's been doing it all year, all his career really. And the city of Philadelphia should really not take it for granted and much love The Process."</p>
<p>Boston coach Joe Mazzulla started three players making their first career postseason appearances in Ron Harper Jr., Luka Garza and Baylor Scheierman. The Celtics fell behind 30-15 early but rallied to cut an 18-point fourth-quarter deficit to one before stalling. Boston missed three chances to take the lead in the final four minutes.</p>
<p>Tatum, who returned from a torn Achilles in March, was unavailable for the deciding game due to knee stiffness. Boston blew a 3-1 series lead against the seventh-seeded Sixers, raising significant questions heading into the offseason despite a strong regular season.</p>
<p>Philadelphia, healthy and cohesive, advances with growing confidence under team president Daryl Morey's roster construction around Embiid and Maxey.</p>
<p><a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/betting/basketball-picks/nba/">The Knicks are -260 favorites over the Sixers</a>, giving them a 72 percent implied probability of advancing to the Eastern Conference Finals. </p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 02 May 2026 23:20:26 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285426/Joel-Embiid-Tyrese-Maxey-Lead-76ers-Past-Celtics-In-Game-7-To-Complete-Historic-3-1-Comeback</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Embiid_Joel_phi_220208.jpg" />
   </item>

      <title>Brandon Ingram Out For Game 7 Versus Cavs</title>

      <description><p>The Toronto Raptors ruled Brandon Ingram out for Sunday's Game 7 against the Cleveland Cavaliers due to right heel inflammation.</p>

   <item>
      <title>Donovan Mitchell After Cavs Close Out Raptors In 7 Games: 'We Play In A Couple Days'</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285443/Donovan-Mitchell-After-Cavs-Close-Out-Raptors-In-7-Games-We-Play-In-A-Couple-Days</link>
      <description><p>The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 114-102 in Game 7 to close out the series on Sunday night.</p>
<p>Jarrett Allen tied a playoff career high with 22 points and 19 rebounds. Donovan Mitchell added 22 points, with James Harden finishing with 18 points.</p>
<p>"I think we've already moved on (to focusing on Detroit)," Mitchell said following the game. "We understand we won this game, but we play in a couple days."</p>
<p>Allen credited the defensive side of the ball, though added that the Cavs still need to tighten up their overall game.</p>
<p>"I think the defensive stops, rebounds and the offense is still shaky in some areas, but I think when we rebound the ball and get stops, that just translates to the offense so much better and transition and open shots for everybody," said Allen.</p>
<p>Scott Barnes finished with 24 points and nine rebounds, with RJ Barrett adding 23 points.</p>
<p>The Raptors were without Brandon Ingram for Game 7.</p>
<p>Raptors head coach Darko Rajakovic credited his team's effort.</p>
<p>"We gave it all, everything we had today," Rajakovic said. "Our guys were awesome. We made it hard on them."</p>
<p>The home team won every game in the series.</p>
<p>The Cavs are set to face the Pistons on Tuesday.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 04 May 2026 01:11:57 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285443/Donovan-Mitchell-After-Cavs-Close-Out-Raptors-In-7-Games-We-Play-In-A-Couple-Days</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Mitchell_Donovan_cle_260501.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Luka Doncic To Remain Out For Start Of Series Versus Thunder</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285440/Luka-Doncic-To-Remain-Out-For-Start-Of-Series-Versus-Thunder</link>
      <description><p>Luka Doncic will remain out for the start of the Los Angeles Lakers' series against the Oklahoma City Thunder, according to Shams Charania of ESPN.</p>
<p>Doncic, who is recovering from a Grade 2 hamstring strain, is being evaluated on a week-to-week timeline.</p>
<p>"The Lakers are evaluating Doncic on a week-to-week basis. He's missed about a month right now. One source told me in the last few days it's still a slow path on Doncic's recovery. </p>
<p>"He's doing more and more on the court, but right now still not full-fledge running or full-contact workouts," said Charania.</p>
<p>It was reported on Friday that there is <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285420/Luka-Doncic-Has-No-Timeline-For-Return-Still-Hasnt-Advanced-To-1-On-1-Or-Full-Contact-Work">still no timetable</a> for Doncic's return. </p></description>
      <pubDate>Sun, 03 May 2026 21:15:06 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285440/Luka-Doncic-To-Remain-Out-For-Start-Of-Series-Versus-Thunder</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Doncic_Luka_lal_260225.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Pistons Defeat Magic 116-94 In Game 7</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285442/Pistons-Defeat-Magic-116-94-In-Game-7</link>
      <description><p>The Detroit Pistons defeated the Orlando Magic 116-94 in Game 7 to complete the comeback and win the first-round series.</p>
<p>Cade Cunningham finished the game with 32 points, with Tobias Harris adding 30 points. </p>
<p>"No one can ever say [stuff] to me about Tobias Harris," Pistons coach J.B. Bickerstaff said. "He's a leader and a great human being, and he's a high-level competitor. He showed up tonight and did what he did with everything on the line."</p>
<p>Jalen Duren also added 15 points and 15 rebounds in the win.</p>
<p>Paolo Banchero was unsure when asked whether the Magic had enough to compete following the loss.</p>
<p>"I want to say yes, but this is the third straight time we haven't gotten out of the first round," Banchero said. "So, if you are going off the last three years, the answer is no. The nice answer is yes, but honestly speaking, I can't say we're good enough to be in the Finals or the Eastern finals because the last three years, we've had the same result. So, that's your answer."</p>
<p>Orlando coach Jamahl Mosley avoided answering any specific questions over the offseason.</p>
<p>"There's time to reflect on this and start thinking about changes we might be able to make," Mosley said. "Today is about the gratitude for these guys and how they gave us a chance to play in a Game 7. They fought and battled the whole way. We just didn't get the job done."</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sun, 03 May 2026 21:43:17 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285442/Pistons-Defeat-Magic-116-94-In-Game-7</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Cunningham_Cade_det_260501.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Anthony Edwards Tells Teammates He Plans To Return During Series Against Spurs</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285424/Anthony-Edwards-Tells-Teammates-He-Plans-To-Return-During-Series-Against-Spurs</link>
      <description><p>Anthony Edwards has informed his Minnesota Timberwolves teammates he intends to return at some point during their second-round series against the San Antonio Spurs, team sources told The Athletic. Edwards has been undergoing around-the-clock treatment on his injured left knee.</p>
<p>Chris Finch said Saturday that Edwards' week-to-week designation remains unchanged, making a Game 1 appearance on Monday all but impossible. Edwards did not practice Saturday but was on the court afterward getting shots up.</p>
<p>Edwards suffered a hyperextension and bone bruise in his left knee during Game 4 against Denver and did not play the final 2.5 games of Minnesota's first-round series. The Wolves advanced without him, winning two of those three games.</p>
<p>"Anytime you can get someone that's been hurt back, especially Ant, just the gravity that he carries, even him just being on the court will help us out a lot," forward Jaden McDaniels said. "Whenever he's ready, I told him we're going to hold it down until he gets ready."</p>
<p>Finch had signaled optimism about Edwards' availability before the Denver series ended, saying the Wolves would "be lucky enough to get him back" if they advanced. His right knee, which caused him to miss 11 of the final 14 regular season games, may also benefit from the additional rest.</p>
<p>Guard Ayo Dosunmu, who averaged 21.8 points against Denver, remains day to day with a sore right calf. Game 2 is Wednesday at San Antonio.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 02 May 2026 22:42:11 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285424/Anthony-Edwards-Tells-Teammates-He-Plans-To-Return-During-Series-Against-Spurs</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Edwards_Anthony_min_260420.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Blazers Expect Damian Lillard To Return Next Season; Will Receive Trade Interest In Jrue Holiday</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285435/Blazers-Expect-Damian-Lillard-To-Return-Next-Season;-Will-Receive-Trade-Interest-In-Jrue-Holiday</link>
      <description><p>The Portland Trail Blazers expect Damian Lillard to return to the lineup next season after the guard suffered a torn Achilles in April 2025.</p>
<p>The Blazers could potentially have a starting backcourt of Lillard and Jrue Holiday, though the team also expects Holiday to receive trade interest this offseason.</p>
<p>Holiday averaged 16.3 points and 6.1 assists in his first season with the Blazers. </p>
<p>Holiday has two years left on his current deal, including a player option for the 2027-28 season.</p>
<p>The Blazers are also expected to be <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285425/Blazers-To-Be-Prime-Trade-Suitor-For-Giannis-Antetokounmpo-May-Pursue-Anthony-Davis-As-Alternative">prime trade suitors</a> for Giannis Antetokounmpo. </p></description>

   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Sabrina Ionescu To Undergo MRI On Injured Ankle</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285439/Sabrina-Ionescu-To-Undergo-MRI-On-Injured-Ankle</link>
      <description><p>Sabrina Ionescu is set to undergo an MRI on her injured left ankle following the New York Liberty's 79-67 win in preseason over the Connecticut Sun.</p>
<p>"[Things are] positive right now," first-year Liberty coach Chris DeMarco said. "We're just going to do the test tomorrow and that's the only update I have."</p>
<p>It is the same ankle that Ionescu required season-ending surgery on during her rookie season. </p>
<p>New York will host Connecticut in the regular season starting Friday. </p></description>

   <item>
      <title>Obinna Ekezie Commits To Louisville, Will Reclassify To 2026 Class</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285438/Obinna-Ekezie-Commits-To-Louisville-Will-Reclassify-To-2026-Class</link>
      <description><p>Center Obinna Ekezie committed to Louisville on Sunday and will reclassify into the class of 2026.</p>
<p>Ekezie was ranked as a top-five prospect in the junior class. He is also ranked as the No. 1 center in the junior class, and will push to be the top-ranked center for the senior class.</p>
<p>"I have chosen to commit to University of Louisville as I feel it's the best situation to develop, showcase my game and strive to win a national championship," Ekezie told ESPN.</p>
<p>Ekezie picked the Cardinal over Maryland, BYU, Arkansas and Kentucky.</p></description>

   <item>
      <title>Jaylen Brown Says This Season Was 'One Of My Most Fun Years Playing Basketball'</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285433/Jaylen-Brown-Says-This-Season-Was-One-Of-My-Most-Fun-Years-Playing-Basketball</link>
      <description><p>Jaylen Brown reflected on the Boston Celtics' season following their <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285426/Joel-Embiid-Tyrese-Maxey-Lead-76ers-Past-Celtics-In-Game-7-To-Complete-Historic-3-1-Comeback">Game 7 loss to the Philadelphia 76ers</a> in the first round.</p>
<p>"This is probably one of my most fun years playing basketball," Brown said following the loss. "It wasn't always perfect. It wasn't always analytically (or) aesthetically pleasing, but we won a lot of basketball games, and people could see the grit and the fight that we played with every single night."</p>
<p>With Jayson Tatum out of Game 7, Brown finished with 33 points and 9 rebounds.</p>
<p>Without Tatum, the Celtics started Baylor Scheierman, Ron Harper Jr., and Luka Garza alongside Tatum and Derrick White.</p>
<p>Brown added that he wished that team had trusted that style more throughout the series. </p>
<p>"I wish we played that style and trusted that style more, even throughout the playoffs, even through wins and through losses," Brown said. "Obviously, it's not always the easiest decision, but I wish. That style for our team was how we empowered the rest of our group, and you saw tonight how everybody came out and played their tail off. I wish we trusted that more."</p>
<p>Brown averaged 28.7 points, 6.9 rebounds, and 5.1 assists on the season. </p></description>
      <pubDate>Sun, 03 May 2026 13:01:58 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285433/Jaylen-Brown-Says-This-Season-Was-One-Of-My-Most-Fun-Years-Playing-Basketball</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Brown_Jaylen_bos_250504.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>How To Watch Raptors Vs Cavaliers Playoff Game 7: Live Stream, TV Channel, Predictions</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285429/How-To-Watch-Raptors-Vs-Cavaliers-Playoff-Game-7-Live-Stream-TV-Channel-Predictions</link>
      <description><p style="position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; text-align: center; z-index: 9999; margin: 0; padding: 10px; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);"><a href="https://imp.i305175.net/c/3589123/3360402/11640?subId1=RealGM" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><input style="background-color: #ea7910; color: #ffffff; border-color: #141414; border-radius: 65px; cursor: pointer; border-width: 3px; padding: 10px; margin: 0;" type="button" value="STREAM RAPTORS VS CAVALIERS GAME 7 ON PEACOCK TODAY!" /> </a></p>
<p style="position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; text-align: center; z-index: 9999; margin: 0px; padding-top: 10px; padding-right: 10px; padding-bottom: 10px; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);"> </p>
<p>The Eastern Conference First Round reaches its ultimate conclusion this Sunday, May 3, as the <strong>Cleveland Cavaliers</strong> host the <strong>Toronto Raptors</strong> for a winner-take-all Game 7. Following a heart-stopping 112-110 overtime victory in Toronto on Friday, the fifth-seeded Raptors have successfully erased a 3-2 deficit to force a deciding game in Ohio. For the Cavaliers, the mission is clear: defend home court at Rocket Arena or see a 52-win season come to an early end. Catch this legacy-defining matchup live on Peacock.</p>
<p><a href="https://imp.i305175.net/c/3589123/3360402/11640?subId1=RealGM" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> <input style="background-color: #ea7910; color: #ffffff; border-color: #141414; border-radius: 65px; cursor: pointer; border-width: 3px; padding: 10px; margin: 10px;" type="button" value="WATCH THE RAPTORS VS CAVALIERS GAME 7" /></a></p>
<p>Game 6 was an instant classic defined by the brilliance of <strong>Scottie Barnes</strong>, who tallied 25 points and a massive 14 assists to guide Toronto through a grueling overtime period. <strong>RJ Barrett</strong> provided the scoring punch with 24 points, including the go-ahead bucket in the extra session. The Cavaliers were led by <strong>Evan Mobley's</strong> monster 26-point, 14-rebound double-double, but a quiet shooting night from <strong>Donovan Mitchell</strong> (11-of-26) and 18 team turnovers allowed the Raptors to stay alive. To win Game 7, Cleveland must capitalize on their home-court advantage and find more efficient perimeter scoring. Witness the pressure live on Peacock.</p>
<p>The spotlight now turns to Cleveland, where the Cavaliers have been dominant all season. The Cavs will need <strong>James Harden</strong> to minimize the turnovers that plagued them in Game 6, while <strong>Jarrett Allen</strong> aims to control the interior against Toronto's aggressive frontcourt. For the Raptors, the availability of <strong>Brandon Ingram</strong> (heel) remains a key storyline, as his presence adds a layer of shot-making that has frustrated Cleveland's defense.       <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285421/Jayson-Tatum-Out-For-Game-7-With-Knee-Stiffness</link>
      <description><p>Jayson Tatum was ruled out of the Boston Celtics' Game 7 against the Philadelphia 76ers on Saturday night due to knee stiffness.</p>
<p>"He just came in today with knee discomfort," Celtics coach Joe Mazzulla said during his pregame media availability a few minutes after Tatum was ruled out. "And we decided, the medical staff and myself, that he would not play."</p>
<p>Tatum <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285402/Jayson-Tatum-Not-Concerned-About-Left-Calf-Tightness-Expects-To-Play-Game-7">left the Game 6</a> with left calf tightness.</p>
<p>"I expect to play," Tatum said following Game 6. "It was my other leg, not the one I injured last year. I mean, I wasn't like overly concerned."</p>
<p>Tatum is averaging 23.3 points and 10.7 rebounds in the first round. </p></description>

   <item>
      <title>Luka Doncic Has 'No Timeline' For Return, Still Hasn't Advanced To 1-On-1 Or Full Contact Work</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285420/Luka-Doncic-Has-No-Timeline-For-Return-Still-Hasnt-Advanced-To-1-On-1-Or-Full-Contact-Work</link>
      <description><p>Los Angeles Lakers guard Luka Doncic still has no timetable for his return from a Grade 2 hamstring strain, according to Cassidy Hubbarth of NBA On Prime.</p>
<p>"There's been no timeline, there has been some progress on the court. He's now doing some movement work in drills, getting up shots, but it is controlled," said Hubbarth on Friday night. </p>
<p>The Lakers, who <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285415/LeBron-James-Embraces-Small-Victories-As-Lakers-Eliminate-Rockets-In-Game-6">eliminated the Rockets in Game 6</a> of the first round, are now set to face the Thunder starting Tuesday. </p>
<p>Hubbarth added that Doncic still has not advanced to any contact work.</p>
<p>"He hasn't advanced to 1-on-1 or full contact work yet, and he's not into any scrimmages. So it's a little more than just spot shooting but still a step away from anything live ... this remains a slow build towards a return, not an imminent one," said Hubbarth. </p>
<p>It was reported last week that <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285357/Luka-Doncic-Unlikely-To-Play-In-Second-Round-If-Lakers-Advance">Doncic is unlikely to play</a> in the second round.</p></description>

   <item>
      <title>Nikola Jokic Expected To Sign Four-Year, $278M Extension With Nuggets In Offseason</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285419/Nikola-Jokic-Expected-To-Sign-Four-Year-$278M-Extension-With-Nuggets-In-Offseason</link>
      <description><p>Nikola Jokic <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285397/Nikola-Jokic-Wants-To-Stay-With-Nuggets-Forever-Says-Team-Far-Away-From-Title">admitted a hard reality</a> that the Denver Nuggets are not currently close to title contention after they were eliminated in the first round of the playoffs, but he remains committed to the franchise and is expected to sign a contract extension this offseason. Jokic turned down a three-year, $212 million extension with the Nuggets last offseason, but can sign this summer for $278 million over four seasons.</p>
<p>While Jokic remains central to everything the Nuggets do, there could be significant changes to the roster around him.</p>
<p>"This is a team that has a lot of questions now going into the offseason," said Shams Charania on Stephen A. Smith's radio show on Friday. "I will tell you, the Denver Nuggets, from their top brass on down to that organization, they believe Nicole Jokic at his word. He wants to be there."</p>
<p>"This is not a situation where he's talking about potentially leaving, or looking elsewhere. Or saying 'Hey, I need you guys to do this. I need you guys to do that.'</p>
<p>"He's very, very internally and externally 'I'm here, no matter what, I'm re-signing.'</p>
<p>"And so that's the approach. But there are going to be changes in Denver. I don't know how much, but there's going to be some level of change. Whether that's tinkering a couple a couple players around... But they are so strapped financially moving forward in whether it's the tax, whether it's approaching the aprons, that there's going to be a lot of a lot of conversations about players on this roster."</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 02 May 2026 09:43:37 EDT</pubDate>

   <item>
      <title>Kevin Durant Burner Question Was Significant Distraction Rockets Never Fully Resolved</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285418/Kevin-Durant-Burner-Question-Was-Significant-Distraction-Rockets-Never-Fully-Resolved</link>
      <description><p>Kevin Durant's first season with the Houston Rockets ended in disappointment, marked by a knee injury, a sprained right ankle, and unresolved questions about his relationship with teammates. The Rockets were eliminated by the Los Angeles Lakers in six games with Durant appearing in only of them and his future with the franchise uncertain less than one year after his trade from the Phoenix Suns.</p>
<p>Allegations surfaced during the season that Durant had criticized teammates, including Alperen Sengun and Jabari Smith Jr., through a burner account on X. Several league sources with close ties to Rockets players described the situation as a significant distraction that was never fully resolved internally.</p>
<p>"My teammates know what it is," Durant said during a media session in February. "We've been locked in the whole season."</p>
<p>Durant was one of just five NBA players to average 26 points, five rebounds and four assists during the regular season. However, the Rockets struggled with cohesion throughout the year.</p>
<p>A knee injury suffered in practice kept Durant out of Game 1 against the Lakers. He returned for Game 2 but sprained his right ankle in the second half, missing the rest of the series. Durant also drew attention in Game 3 by receiving treatment at Toyota Center rather than sitting with teammates on the bench during a pivotal collapse.</p>
<p>Ime Udoka defended the decision by Durant.</p>
<p>"He was back there getting treatment, getting the ice and doing things you can't do on the bench," Udoka said.</p>
<p>In October, <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/282421/Kevin-Durant-Rockets-Agree-To-Two-Year-$90M-Extension">Durant signed a two-year, $90 million extension that contains a player option for the 2027-28 season that will pay him $46 million</a>. Durant took $30 million less than his max available contract.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 02 May 2026 09:15:04 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285418/Kevin-Durant-Burner-Question-Was-Significant-Distraction-Rockets-Never-Fully-Resolved</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Durant_Kevin_hou_251010.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Thunder, Spurs Heavy Favorites In Western Conference Semis With Lakers, Wolves Facing Key Injuries</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285416/Thunder-Spurs-Heavy-Favorites-In-Western-Conference-Semis-With-Lakers-Wolves-Facing-Key-Injuries</link>
      <description><p>The Western Conference Semifinals are set, with the top-seeded Oklahoma City Thunder hosting No. 4 Los Angeles Los Angeles Lakers, and No. 2 San Antonio Spurs facing No. 6 Minnesota Timberwolves. Both series feature top-10 NBA players sidelined by injury, accentuating the favorite status of the Thunder and Spurs.</p>
<p><a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/nba/team-stats/2026/Advanced_Stats/Team_Totals/Regular_Season">Oklahoma City and San Antonio finished first and second in Net Rating during the regular season</a>. Both are approximately <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/betting/basketball-picks/nba/">14-point favorites</a> in their respective Game 1 matchups.</p>
<p>Series odds reflect similar confidence. The Thunder open at -3000 and the Spurs at -2000, implying a 97% and 95% probability of advancing, respectively.</p>
<p>Luka Doncic, recovering from a Grade 2 left hamstring injury, is considered unlikely to return for the second round. Anthony Edwards is working back from a bone bruise and hyperextended knee suffered in Game 4 of the first round.</p>
<p>Minnesota advanced without Edwards, Donte DiVincenzo and Ayo Dosunmu in a Game 6 win over the Denver Nuggets. DiVincenzo is out for the season with a torn Achilles, leaving the Wolves to face Victor Wembanyama and San Antonio without their entire starting backcourt.</p>
<p>Oklahoma City swept Los Angeles 4-0 in the regular season by an average of 29.3 points, the largest point-differential gap between any second-round matchup this postseason.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 02 May 2026 08:11:19 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285416/Thunder-Spurs-Heavy-Favorites-In-Western-Conference-Semis-With-Lakers-Wolves-Facing-Key-Injuries</guid>

   <item>
      <title>LeBron James Embraces 'Small Victories' As Lakers Eliminate Rockets In Game 6</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285415/LeBron-James-Embraces-Small-Victories-As-Lakers-Eliminate-Rockets-In-Game-6</link>
      <description><p>LeBron James made NBA history during the Los Angeles Lakers' 98-78 Game 6 win over Houston Friday, becoming the oldest player to lead all participants in total points scored across a playoff series. James, at the age of 41, finished with 139 points over the six games</p>
<p>"It's not my style at all," James told ESPN after posting 28 points, eight assists and seven rebounds in the closeout victory. "I think me personally, the accepting and trying to be OK with the small victories comes with where I am in my career. Understanding, s---, who knows how many more playoff series I'm going to be a part of? If I play one more or two more or three more seasons, that doesn't guarantee me to be in the postseason. So just trying to appreciate the moments, whatever it is, and however long I'm playing. It's pretty cool to have the opportunity to lead a team, at 41 years old, into the playoffs and for us to be able to win it."</p>
<p>James entered the season in a reduced offensive role behind Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves. When both players were injured April 2 against Oklahoma City, he stepped back into the primary option and guided Los Angeles through the first round.</p>
<p>"I mean, to be able to experience something [new], it was just totally different for me," James told ESPN. "In March, it was a totally different role for me. It was super uncomfortable, but comfortable. I had to get into that. But it was also winning. That's all I care about. But I knew at the same time I could give more. But maybe giving more wasn't what was a fit for our team. And I accepted that and I was OK with that. Not from a team aspect, I was OK with that. I was able to put my ego to the side for the betterment of the team, understanding that I could do it."</p>
<p>Defensively, Los Angeles held Houston to 35% shooting. Deandre Ayton guarded Alperen Sengun individually after the Rockets exploited double-teams in Game 5, limiting Sengun to one assist in the closeout game.</p>
<p>"I took the challenge to my chin," Ayton said. "Just putting the team on my back and them trusting me. ... That's what really got everything going, to be honest."</p>
<p>Rui Hachimura added 21 points on 5-of-7 three-point shooting. Reaves contributed 15 points in just his second game back after missing four weeks with a left oblique injury. Los Angeles committed just 11 turnovers, their fewest of the series.</p>
<p>The Lakers now face defending champion Oklahoma City, which swept Los Angeles by an average of 29.3 points in four regular season meetings. <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/betting/basketball-picks/nba/">Game 1 is scheduled for Tuesday with the Thunder favored by 14.5 points over the Lakers</a>.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 02 May 2026 07:58:04 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285415/LeBron-James-Embraces-Small-Victories-As-Lakers-Eliminate-Rockets-In-Game-6</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/James_LeBron_lal_260502.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>JJ Redick Says Lakers Winning Series Against Rockets 'A Big Deal'</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285414/JJ-Redick-Says-Lakers-Winning-Series-Against-Rockets-A-Big-Deal</link>
      <description><p>The Los Angeles Lakers defeated the Houston Rockets 98-78 in Game 6 to win the first-round series 4-2 on Friday night.</p>
<p>LeBron James finished with 28 points, with Rui Hachimura adding 21 points. Austin Reaves added 15 points in his second game back from an injured oblique. </p>
<p>James credited the Lakers' defense with the win.</p>
<p>"In order for us to win we had to protect the ball, we had to rebound and we had to be physical, make them take tough shots," James said. "I thought defensively we came in with a great game plan and we executed that thing to a T."</p>
<p>Amen Thompson lead the Rockets with 18 points, with Alperen Sengun adding 17 points.</p>
<p>Rockets head coach Ime Udoka expressed disappointment for overall series. It is the second straight year that the Rockets lost in the first round.</p>
<p>"Everybody's disappointed, no doubt," Udoka said. "Not what we expected coming into the game tonight or the series in general. We all thought that we'd be taking it back for a Game 7."</p>
<p>Lakers coach JJ Redick put his team's accomplishment without Luka Doncic into perspective.</p>
<p>"For us to be written off a few weeks ago and win a playoff series is a big deal," Redick said.</p>
<p>The Lakers will face the Thunder in the second round starting Tuesday.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 02 May 2026 02:30:41 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285414/JJ-Redick-Says-Lakers-Winning-Series-Against-Rockets-A-Big-Deal</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Redick_JJ_lal_241010.jpg" />
   </item>

      <description><p>Duke have entered an enterprise partnership with Amazon that includes televising three games next season.</p>
<p>The package includes neutral-site games against UConn on November 25, Michigan on December 21, and Gonzaga on February 20. </p>
<p>The deal also includes NIL partnership opportunities to be announced as a later date.</p>
